projectName: Nebulas Prime — The Cross-Chain NFT Liquidity & Yield Aggregator
description: Nebulas Prime is a multi-layered protocol designed to solve the capital inefficiency of high-value NFT collections. The system consists of four primary subsystems: 1. The Nebula Vault (Core), which handles the wrapping of ERC-721 assets into 'Nebula-Tokens' (ERC-1155) that represent a claim on the asset plus accrued yield. 2. The Strategy Router, which uses ZK-proofs to verify that the NFT's floor price (sourced via Chainlink) justifies a specific debt-to-equity ratio before routing liquidity in
angle: Nebulas Prime introduces 'Yield-Bearing NFT Wrappers' that allow users to maintain NFT utility/provenance while their underlying floor value is programmatically deployed into Uniswap V3 liquidity positions and Aave lending markets.
